mapper.select:
SELECT CD.COMMON_CODE, CD.COMMON_CODE_NAME, CD.ACTIVE_YN, CD.SORT_ORDER, CD.DESCRIPTION, CD.ATTR1, CD.ATTR2, CD.ATTR3, CD.ATTR4, CD.ATTR5, CD.ATTR6, CD.ATTR7, CD.ATTR8, CD.ATTR9, CD.ATTR10, CD.CREATED_AT, CD.CREATED_USER_ID, (SELECT U.NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE CD.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID) AS CREATED_USER_NAME, CD.UPDATED_AT, CD.UPDATED_USER_ID, (SELECT U.NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE CD.UPDATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID) AS UPDATED_USER_NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_CMMN_CD CD WHERE 1=1
AND CD.COMMON_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{commonCode}, '%')
AND CD.COMMON_CODE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{commonCodeName}, '%')
ORDER BY CD.SORT_ORDER, CD.COMMON_CODE

SELECT DTL.COMMON_CODE, DTL.COMMON_CODE_DTL, DTL.COMMON_CODE_DTL_NAME, DTL.ACTIVE_YN, DTL.SORT_ORDER, DTL.DESCRIPTION, DTL.ATTR1, DTL.ATTR2, DTL.ATTR3, DTL.ATTR4, DTL.ATTR5, DTL.ATTR6, DTL.ATTR7, DTL.ATTR8, DTL.ATTR9, DTL.ATTR10, DTL.CREATED_USER_ID, (SELECT U.NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE DTL.CREATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID) AS CREATED_USER_NAME, DTL.UPDATED_AT, DTL.UPDATED_USER_ID, (SELECT U.NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE DTL.UPDATED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID) AS UPDATED_USER_NAME FROM JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_CMMN_CD CD, JPAS_DB.JPAS_TB_CMMN_CD_DTL DTL WHERE 1=1 AND CD.COMMON_CODE = DTL.COMMON_CODE
AND DTL.COMMON_CODE = #{commonCode}
AND CD.COMMON_CODE_DTL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{commonCodeDtl}, '%')
AND CD.COMMON_CODE_DTL_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{commonCodeDtlName}, '%')
ORDER BY DTL.SORT_ORDER, DTL.COMMON_CODE
